from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import time
import uuid
from collections import deque, defaultdict
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Any, Callable, Coroutine, Deque, Dict, List, Optional, Union, TypeVar


T = TypeVar('T')
HandlerType = Callable[..., Coroutine[Any, Any,Any]] | Union[Callable[..., Any], Coroutine[Any]]


@dataclass
class Event:
    type: str
    payload: Any
    timestamp: float = field(init=False)
    source:Optional[str] = None

    def __post_init__(self):
        if not self.timestamp:
            self.timestamp = time.time()


class Middleware:
    def __init__(self, fn: Callable[[Event], Event | None]):        self.fn = fn

    def process(self, event: Event) ->Optional[Event]:
        return self.fn(event)


class Subscription:
    def __init__(self, handler: Callable, id: str, priority: int, is_async: bool, is_once: bool):
        self.handler = handler
        self.id = id
        self.priority = priority
        is_async_callable = asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(handler)
        self.is_async = is_async or is_async_callable
        self.is_once = is_once
        self.active = True

    async def call(self, event: Event) -> Any:
        if self.is_async:
            return await self.handler(event)
        return self.handler(event)


class EventBus:
    def __init__(self):
    self._subscriptions:Dict[str, List[Subscription]] = defaultdict(list)
    self._middleware: List[Middleware] =[]    self._stats: Dict[str,Union[int, str]] = {
        'total_subscribers': 0,
        'total_subscriptions_by_type': defaultdict(lambda: 0)
    }
    self._handlers: Dict[str,Subscription] = {}

    def subscribe(self, event:Union[Callable[...,Any],Subscription], event:Union[Callable,Subscription], event:Union[Callable[...,Any], Subscription,Subscription], event:Union[Callable[...,Any], Subscription,Subscription], event:Union[Callable[...,Any], Subscription,Subscription]):
